name: 沈家内室
description: 温馨的夫妻内室，内有雕花木床或绣榻，旁设绣架供女主刺绣。房间内摆有茶几茶盏，墙边有衣架或柜子。空间亲密舒适，装饰简洁雅致，体现沈家风格，适合日常起居和私密对话。
visual_reference: Cozy Ming dynasty private inner chamber of a wealthy family, wooden bed with embroidered items, embroidery frame with tiger hat patterns, tea set on table, soft natural lighting, intimate domestic atmosphere, detailed traditional Chinese interiors
visual_prompt_negative: modern elements, clutter, western furniture, blurry
atmosphere: 亲密温馨, 调侃暧昧
lighting: 白天柔和光线从门窗进入，均匀舒适
emotional_range: 怀孕日常的温馨到和离话题的意外怔愣与一笑
